description: Post-change invariant sweep for Ralph loop iterations. Any change touching group_id, canonical_proposals, or approval paths must pass these tests before loop completion.

sweepFiles.reason: Verifies groupIdEnforcer wiring in MCP operations (ARCH-001)
MCP client integration — group_id must propagate correctly
Trace reference validation — canonical_proposals trace_ref integrity
Group governance — ^allura- enforcement and tenant isolation

invariants.description: approvePromotions() must emit an explicit runtime warning when called
invariants.rationale: Deprecation without a runtime warning is not deprecation. Callers must be alerted at runtime, not just IDE hints.

invariants.description: canonical_proposals is the exact table name — no aliases
invariants.rationale: Table name aliasing creates drift between code and SQL schema.

invariants.description: ^allura- group_id prefix enforced on all DB operations
invariants.rationale: Tenant isolation depends on group_id format consistency.

invariants.description: /api/curator/approve is the sole operational approval door
invariants.rationale: Dual approval paths create divergence risk.
